reference_transcript: Hello, my name is Linh and I am learning English pronunciation every day.
I usually wake up at six thirty, have breakfast, and take the bus to school.
My hometown is a small city near the coast where the weather is warm and people are very friendly.
Technology has changed the way we communicate, work, and access information in our daily lives.
Protecting the environment is important because climate change affects food, water, and health worldwide.
Online education gives students flexible schedules, but it also requires strong motivation and time management skills.
When I travel abroad, I enjoy trying local food, visiting museums, and practicing English with native speakers.
In my opinion, learning a foreign language opens many career opportunities and helps you understand different cultures more deeply.
